// SwarmedSettings: Reading order: below this line, every // key is documentation; the next block lists real settings in the same order. Swarmed adds call-for-help reinforcements (landscape/dungeon), CreatureEx champion variants, aura pulser and corpse exploiter tuning, and broadcast messages. Inside AuraPulser and CorpseExploiter: // lines first, then values (same order).
// LandscapeEnabled: When true, open-world creatures may roll for reinforcement spawns on death (see LandscapeChance and spawn counts).
// LandscapeChance: Base probability (0–1) for landscape call-for-help before online/landblock scaling.
// LandscapeSpawnMin: Minimum reinforcements spawned on a successful landscape roll.
// LandscapeSpawnMax: Maximum reinforcements spawned on a successful landscape roll.
// DungeonEnabled: When true, dungeon creatures may roll for reinforcement spawns (see DungeonChance and spawn counts).
// DungeonChance: Base probability (0–1) for dungeon call-for-help before scaling.
// DungeonSpawnMin: Minimum reinforcements on a successful dungeon roll.
// DungeonSpawnMax: Maximum reinforcements on a successful dungeon roll.
// ReinforcementHealthMin: Reinforcement max-health fraction lower bound (rolled per spawn).
// ReinforcementHealthMax: Reinforcement max-health fraction upper bound (rolled per spawn).
// MaxCallerHealth: Creatures with max health above this skip call-for-help reinforcement logic.
// ReinforcementXpBonusMin: XP bonus multiplier lower bound for reinforcement kills.
// ReinforcementXpBonusMax: XP bonus multiplier upper bound for reinforcement kills.
// CreatureChance: Base chance (0–1) for CreatureEx factory random champion replacement; can scale with online players when enabled.
// CreatureChanceScalesWithOnlinePlayers: When true, CreatureChance is increased by online player count × bonus, capped by CreatureChanceMaximumAfterScaling.
// CreatureChanceBonusPerOnlinePlayer: Added to CreatureChance per shard online player when scaling is enabled.
// CreatureChanceMaximumAfterScaling: Cap after online scaling; 0 or less is treated as 1.0.
// ReinforcementChanceScalesWithOnlinePl: When true, landscape/dungeon base chance gains ReinforcementChanceBonusPerOnlinePlayer × shard online count, capped by ReinforcementChanceMaximumAfterScaling.
// ReinforcementChanceBonusPerOnlinePlay: Per-online-player add to reinforcement base chance when that scaling path applies.
// ReinforcementChanceMaximumAfterScalin: Cap for reinforcement chance after online or landblock scaling; 0 or less treated as 1.
// ReinforcementChanceScalesWithLandbloc: When true and the dying creature has a CurrentLandblock, landblock player count scales chance (takes precedence over online scaling when both apply per mod logic).
// ReinforcementChanceBonusPerLandblockP: Per landblock player add to reinforcement base chance when landblock scaling applies.
// AuraPulser: AuraPulser CreatureEx: pulse radius, interval, damage fraction of pulser max health, max targets. Inside AuraPulser: // lines first, then values (same order).
// CorpseExploiter: CorpseExploiter CreatureEx: feed radius and heal fraction of victim max health. Inside CorpseExploiter: // lines first, then values (same order).
// CreatureFeatures: CreatureExType names enabled for random factory replacement (enum string names, JSON array).
// AllowPartialCreatureExTypeMatch: When true, /cex accepts a unique substring of a CreatureExType name (e.g. stomp → Stomper).
// CallForHelpMessages: Random broadcast templates when call-for-help triggers; {0} = creature name.

AuraPulser.// PulseRadiusMeters: Radius in meters for AuraPulser damage pulses.
AuraPulser.// DamageFractionOfPulserMaxHealth: Each pulse deals this fraction of the pulser creature’s max health as damage (before other rules).

CorpseExploiter.// FeedRadiusMeters: Radius to find corpses to exploit for healing.
CorpseExploiter.// HealFractionOfVictimMaxHealth: Heal amount as a fraction of the victim corpse’s max health.
